title: CVE-2025-34150 — CVSS 0.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2025-34150

CVSS Score: 0.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2025-08-07T17:15:28.870
CWEs: CWE-78

The PPPoE configuration interface of the Shenzhen Aitemi M300 Wi-Fi Repeater (hardware model MT02) is vulnerable to command injection via the 'user' parameter. Input is processed unsafely during network setup, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary system commands with root privileges.

References: https://chocapikk.com/posts/2025/when-a-wifi-name-gives-you-root-part-two/, https://www.aliexpress.us/item/3256806767641280.html, https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/shenzhen-aitemi-m300-wifi-repeater-pppoe-username-command-injection
